## Summary

What changed and why (one short paragraph).

## Testing

- [ ] `python -m pytest tests/ -m "not network" -v` (paste exit or attach CI link)
- [ ] If touching live data paths: `python -m pytest tests/ -m network -v` (optional)

## Adversarial checklist (`AGENTS.md`)

- [ ] Data sources stated for new/changed metrics
- [ ] Failure modes surfaced in UI or API errors where relevant
- [ ] No new claims about fund “intent”; proxies labeled with uncertainty

## Notes

Risks or follow-ups for the next reviewer:
